tagline: Budgets, including budgets for Unity AI Gateway, are now generally available.
what_it_does: Budgets, including budgets for Unity AI Gateway, are now generally available. Budgets let admins define spending thresholds. For requests managed through Unity AI Gateway, including Genie interactions, admins can set additional per user thresholds and overrides, with configurable actions such as email alerting and usage blocking.
why_it_matters: To set budgets for Genie specifically, see Manage budgets and cost controls for Genie.
key_takeaway: Budgets, including budgets for Unity AI Gateway, are now generally available.
